item.name: BASE
item.description: This folder serves as base for manual and automated tests, exceptions are separated by category in the following folders

item.name: User Tests
Register with Existing Email
item.description: Registration done twice with the same email, expected to fail, error 400

item.name: Update with Existing Email
item.description: Update user with already registered email, expected to fail, error 400

item.name: Update without ID
item.description: **When editing a user without ID, system should create new user. Expected code 201**

item.name: Delete User with Cart

exec: pm.expect(response.message).to.be.eql('Not allowed to delete user with registered cart')

item.description: **Not allowed to delete user with cart, expect error 400**
**Happy Path and Expected Exceptions for User Category, Tests Automated with Session Cleanup**

item.name: Product with Same Name
item.description: **Cannot create product with already registered name, expect to fail, error 400**

item.name: Delete Product in Cart

exec: pm.expect(response.message).to.be.eql('Não é permitido excluir produto que faz parte de carrinho')

item.description: **Cannot delete product in cart, expect to fail, error 400**

item.name: Update Product without ID
item.description: **When editing product without ID in request, expect to create new product in stock, code 201**

item.name: Cart Tests
One Cart per User
item.description: **Only 1 cart per user allowed, expect code 400**

item.name: Add Products to Cart - Decreases Stock
item.description: **When adding products to cart, same quantity must be subtracted from stock**

item.name: Cancel Purchase - Restores Products to Stock
item.description: **When canceling purchase, cart is deleted and products are returned to stock**
**Happy Path and Expected Exceptions for Cart Category, Tests Automated with Session Cleanup**
